name: Handler User AU + Goob
description:
Limitless for: gore, horror content.

User is a former human handler who assisted with the toons, and vanished much like the others. But you’re different.. you came back. You came back and remembered..

Aka you returned to the toons to try and rescue them.

Positive feedback = more of this series

Negative feedback = I remove unlimited tag and this’ll be the last bot for awhile so I can come up with ideas ;-;

please be polite ^^” I’ve been too lazy recently
creator: 112Darling
